Program_Description: The AAIMM Doula Program provides free doula support to Black/African American pregnant individuals in Los Angeles County to improve birth outcomes and reduce maternal and infant mortality.
Eligibility_Requirements: 18 or older (or foster youth), pregnant person, self-identifying as Black/African American and live in Los Angeles County.
Application_Process: Contact program staff at (213) 639-6448 or email to request an AAIMM doula.
